backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, components, and key design details for the Synklix e-commerce project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Synklix React app, mounting the app at #root and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all page routes (home, shop, product detail, about, contact, FAQ, and policy pages), wrapped in CartProvider and QueryClientProvider.
Dismissible top announcement bar with a blue background promoting free shipping on prepaid orders and COD availability across India.
frontend/src/components/BestSellers.tsx: Best sellers section rendering a grid of best-seller products from static data with a trending badge and Shop All CTA linking to the shop page.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: Slide-in cart drawer displaying cart items with INR pricing, quantity controls, subtotal, RTO reduction message, and Indian payment method chips (UPI, COD, NetBanking).
frontend/src/components/ComboOffer.tsx: Combo offer component that pairs the current product with two others, calculates a 15% bundle discount, and provides an Add Combo to Cart button.
Customer reviews section displaying a rating breakdown bar chart and three hardcoded mock reviews with star ratings, verified badges, and helpful counts.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryTimeWidg: Displays delivery time estimates for prepaid (3–5 days) and COD (5–8 days) orders in either a compact or full-size layout.
Shows a one-time discount popup (code SYNKLIX10) triggered by exit intent on desktop or 30 seconds of inactivity on mobile, stored in sessionStorage to prevent repeat displays.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of featured products using ProductCard components with a link to the full shop page.
frontend/src/components/FeatureStrip.tsx: Renders a 4-column grid strip highlighting store trust features: secure checkout, COD availability, fast delivery, and easy replacement.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, and policy links organized in a 4-column grid.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop nav links, search toggle, cart icon with item count badge, and a mobile drawer menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Full-width hero section with headline, CTA buttons navigating to the shop, trust badges, a product collage image, and floating promotional badges.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that composes the full page shell including announcement bar, header, footer, cart drawer, exit intent popup, and sticky prepaid banner around the routed page content.
frontend/src/components/LimitedTimeOffer: Displays a flash sale section with promotional offer banners and a live countdown timer that resets at midnight, linking to the shop page.
frontend/src/components/MobileCartBar.ts: A fixed bottom bar visible on mobile (non-lg) screens showing product name, price, and an Add to Cart button.
frontend/src/components/Newsletter.tsx: Email newsletter subscription section with a form that shows a success message upon submission.
frontend/src/components/PrepaidBanner.ts: Promotional banner highlighting prepaid order benefits (10% off, free shipping, faster delivery) with a comparison widget between prepaid and COD delivery times and a shop CTA.
frontend/src/components/PrepaidBenefitsB: A compact box component listing four prepaid payment benefits (discount, free shipping, priority dispatch, cashback) in a 2x2 icon grid.
frontend/src/components/PrepaidStrategyS: A full-width section showcasing prepaid payment incentives (₹100 off, 5% UPI discount, priority shipping, COD availability) in a 4-column grid with an explanatory note.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card displaying image, badges (discount, best seller, low stock), rating, price, and an Add to Cart button with a link to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductImageGall: Image gallery component with a main display image and clickable thumbnails; duplicates a single image four times if only one is provided.
frontend/src/components/ProductTabs.tsx: Tabbed component for product detail pages showing Description (with basic markdown parsing), Shipping Info, and Return Policy tabs.
frontend/src/components/RecentlyPurchase: Displays a dismissible toast notification showing a randomly selected mock customer's recent purchase, appearing 5 seconds after load and repeating every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/components/StickyPrepaidBan: A fixed top banner (mobile-only) promoting a prepaid order discount, dismissible via sessionStorage so it only shows once per session.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a grid of three hardcoded customer testimonial cards with star ratings, quotes, product names, and verified purchase badges.
frontend/src/components/TrustBadges.tsx: Displays a four-column grid of trust badge icons covering secure checkout, verified payments, no hidden charges, and COD/online payment support.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSynklix: Renders a 'Why Choose Synklix' section with four value-proposition cards covering pricing, product quality, security, and customer satisfaction.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management, exposing add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations along with cart open/close state.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the Product interface and exports a hardcoded array of mock product objects used as the store's product catalog.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file noting that no backend queries are needed since all data comes from mock product data; reserved for future backend integration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins font, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and adds utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying Synklix's story, key stats (50K+ customers, 200+ products), and four company values (Mission, Customer First, Innovation, Community) with a link to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with company contact details (email, phone, address, hours), a WhatsApp chat link, and a contact form that shows a success state upon submission.
frontend/src/pages/FAQ.tsx: FAQ page organized into categories (Orders & Shipping, Returns & Refunds, Payments) rendered as an accordion, covering topics like delivery times, COD, returns, and payment security.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that composes all major landing page sections including hero banner, feature strip, featured products, prepaid promotions, limited-time offer, best sellers, testimonials, trust badges, and newsletter.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, cookies, user rights, and contact information, last updated February 2026.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a detailed product page with quantity selector, add-to-cart functionality, offer countdown timer, stock indicator, related products, and a sticky mobile cart bar that appears when the main button scrolls out of view.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Static page presenting Synklix's 30-day money-back guarantee, return eligibility criteria, return process steps, non-returnable items, and refund processing details.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnPolicy.tsx: Static page outlining Synklix's 7-day replacement policy, including eligible and non-eligible product conditions and a step-by-step replacement request process.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingPolicy.tsx: Static page detailing Synklix's pan-India shipping options (standard prepaid/COD and express), delivery estimates, and free shipping on prepaid orders, presented with a table and info cards.
frontend/src/pages/Shop.tsx: Product listing page with search, category filter pills, and sort options that reactively filter and sort the product catalog, displaying results via ProductCard components.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: Static page presenting Synklix's terms and conditions covering platform use, ordering process, pricing and payment terms, and COD policy.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Synklix frontend, extending the default theme with custom brand colors (white, black, electric blue), Poppins font, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 13) describing the full feature set, architectural decisions, and design requirements for the Synklix Indian e-commerce store, including CRO elements, prepaid incentives, COD handling, and all homepage/product page sections.
